svg.style: position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; margin: 0; padding: 0; overflow: hidden;

xhtml:div.style: width: 100%; height: 100%; margin: 0; padding: 0; overflow: hidden;

xhtml:iframe.style: width: 100%; height: 100%; border: none; background: white; margin: 0; padding: 0;
